info.title: Cepage
info.description: HTTP API exposing the Cepage typed-skill library: list catalog, run skills, manage schedules, and author new skills from sessions.

servers.description: Relative path under the Cepage HTTP server.

tags.name: skill-runs
tags.description: Skill run records and SSE stream.

tags.name: skill-compiler
tags.description: Compile sessions into reusable skills and validate them.

get.summary: Fetch a single skill by slug.

post.summary: Create a user skill directly (advanced).

get.summary: Fetch a user skill by slug.
Fetch a skill run by id.

post.summary: Cancel a queued or running skill run.

get.summary: SSE stream of lifecycle events for a run.

200.description: text/event-stream — events: snapshot, started, progress, succeeded, failed, cancelled.

post.summary: Create a scheduled skill run.
Fire a schedule immediately.
Infer a JSON Schema from a session's prompt nodes.
Persist a session as a reusable user skill.
Create a webhook subscription. Returns the plaintext secret exactly once.

get.summary: Fetch a webhook subscription by id.

patch.summary: Update a webhook subscription (supports secret rotation).

200.description: Updated subscription. The `secret` field is only present when `secretAction=rotate` was requested.

post.summary: Fire a `webhook.ping` event synchronously to validate the subscription.
Rotate the subscription secret. The new plaintext value is returned exactly once.
Validate a skill against inputs without executing it.
Music Creation Modular Architect — Turn music analyses, artistic intent, and tooling docs into a modular workflow that can generate music artifacts autonomously.
Music MP3 Clean Return — Create a managed flow that analyzes music inputs, refines candidates, uses connector targets, and publishes one stable MP3 package.
Kangourou Daily Drop (v2 — MJ + Shorts) — Generate one Kangourou Records drop end to end with Midjourney covers, Shorts, and two public YouTube uploads.
Kangourou Daily Drop (MVP) — Generate one Kangourou Records drop end to end with zero approval and no Midjourney stage.
Necklace Photo To Etsy Catalog With Clean Return — Turn a folder of necklace photos into grouped product listings, a stable Etsy-ready catalog, and final verification.
Kangourou Pick Persona And Brief — Sub-prompt for selecting one persona and writing the song brief with anti-repetition awareness.
Kangourou Write Lyrics — Sub-prompt for producing final bracketed lyrics and the MiniMax music payload.
Kangourou YouTube Metadata And Upload Spec — Sub-prompt for producing YouTube metadata files and upload specs for Kangourou workflows.
Kangourou Midjourney Prompts (Cover + Short) — Sub-prompt for producing the Midjourney pipeline specs consumed by Kangourou v2.
Celiastuudio Brand Brief — Brand voice, vocabulary, and editorial rules used as source-of-truth context for autonomous reruns.
Etsy Listing Rules — Customer-facing output rules and listing constraints for the necklace photo workflow.
Material Stock Reference — Operational stock and material reference used for safe material assignment in the necklace photo workflow.
Necklace Photo Task Brief — Task scope and grouping brief for the necklace photo workflow family.
Test Session — Compiled from opencode session "Test Session". Graph contains 3 nodes, 3 edges, and 4 detected parameters.
cursor-session-002 — Compiled from cursor session "cursor-session-002". Graph contains 4 nodes, 3 edges, and 4 detected parameters.
Stripe Weekly Report — Compiled from opencode session "Stripe Weekly Report". Graph contains 5 nodes, 5 edges, and 5 detected parameters.
Documentation Pack With Clean Return — Build a reusable documentation or research pack with stable published outputs and final verification.
Three.js Vanilla Documentation Pack (Validated) — Generate a validated Three.js vanilla context pack with clean published docs and a verify marker.
App Builder With Clean Return — Turn a product brief into a runnable app or feature with a clean final workspace handoff.
Game Dev Managed Flow With Clean Return — Drive game-development work from source docs through roadmap, slices, implementation loops, and publish/verify.
Analysis Pipeline Modular Architect — Turn existing analyses into a modular multi-agent workflow that deepens, synthesizes, and generates new data.
Workflow Generator And Publisher — Generate, lint, publish, and verify a reusable workflow artifact.
Workflow API Operator — Operator runbook for creating sessions, configuring workspaces, generating workflows, running them, and validating published outputs via the API.
Hello World Workflow — Create a minimal single-node workflow that proves the end-to-end flow with one stable output file.
REST API Pipeline — Coordinate API requests, transform responses, and publish a stable result bundle with explicit validation.
Scheduled Report Generator — Collect recurring inputs, generate a report, and publish a stable summary package on a repeated cadence.
File Organizer — Sort, classify, and publish a stable manifest for a messy directory of files.
Notification Dispatcher — Fan out one event or briefing across multiple channels while keeping a stable dispatch manifest and verification output.

items.description: One of: skill-run.started, skill-run.succeeded, skill-run.failed, skill-run.cancelled, skill-run.progress, webhook.ping, or "*" for all.

secret.description: Plaintext HMAC secret. Surfaced exactly once on `create` or when `secretAction=rotate` is passed to `PATCH`.

id.description: Server-generated deliveryId for the ping event.
